roa.docketEntryComment: /X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE ORDER CREATED ON 12-10-20/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RECALL - DEFENDANT IS DECEASED/BWR: 07-13-20/BWR1/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: COUNSEL DOES NOT HAVE DEATH CERTIFICATE/X:COURTADVISES COUNSEL THAT ONCE PROOF OF DEATH CERTIFICATE IS OBTAINED, COUNSELCAN THEN ADD IT TO CALENDAR/
/CAL:STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING AND TO SET SENTENCING/CTORD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OF ALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/CONTD:SENTENCING & STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SFSD WARRANT IS DISCHARGED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/WEAP/RX/X: HEARING DATE OF 02-10-20, D9IS CONFIRMED,/DOP/

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/ACM/X AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON 01-15-20/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WS/WEAP/RX/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE AN OUTPATIENT TREATMENT PROGRAM AND COMPLIANCEWITH ACTIVE CASE MANAGEMENT/X:IF DEFENDANT COMPLETES THE PROGRAM WITH NO NEW ARRESTS FOR THE NEXT SIX MONTHS, COUNT ONE SHALL BE REDUCED TO A MISDEMENAOR AT THE TIME OF SENTENCING/X:SHOULD DEFENDANT FAIL TO APPEAR AT SENTENCING, THE COURT SHALL IMPOSE A 30 DAY HAMMER/REMA/ARBUCKLE/CONTD:STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING AND TO SET SENTENCING/DOP/

-/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/PD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X: THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-14-20/987,2/BAIL:50000/SAORD/SA2: SF HONDA AUTO AT 1960 FOLSOM ST, SF/SAORD3/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON  01-13-20, D9/DOP/
